# c0mpute

> Decentralized compute marketplace. CLI-first. Pay workers with spare GPUs to run your jobs. Run your own GPU and earn. MIT-licensed, open source.

## Getting Started

- [Install](https://c0mpute.com/getting-started): One-line install via `curl -fsSL https://c0mpute.com/install.sh | sh`. Supports Linux and macOS (x86_64, aarch64).

## Docs

- [CLI Reference & Cookbook](https://c0mpute.com/docs): Full CLI walkthrough — identity/wallet, workers, transcode jobs, AI inference, reputation, plugins, health checks.

## Modules

- [Plugins](https://c0mpute.com/plugins): Three core modules — transcode (FFmpeg-based video encoding), coinpay (DID identity + escrow payments), infernet (AI LLM inference).

## Blog

- [Blog](https://c0mpute.com/blog): Project updates and articles.

## Project

- [GitHub](https://github.com/profullstack/c0mpute): Source code, design proposals (DIPs), and releases. MIT license.
- [Status](https://c0mpute.com/status): Live network metrics.
- [Contact](https://c0mpute.com/contact): hello@c0mpute.com · security@c0mpute.com · GitHub Issues.
